potential_hallucinations.requirement: The system shall allow customers to search for products.
The system shall allow customers to complete payment as part of the ordering process.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: After finding something they like, they can add it to their wishlist and then move it to the cart.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall allow customers to move items from their wishlist to the shopping cart.

hallucinations.rewritten_requirement: The system shall enable customers to track their orders after placement.
hallucinations.reason: The source text mentions tracking an order 'after placing the order', not 'after placement'.

hallucinations.rewritten_requirement: The system shall allow customers to complete payment as part of the ordering process.
hallucinations.reason: The source text does not explicitly state that completing payment is part of the ordering process, only that it ends after payment.

ambiguities.rewritten_requirement: The system shall allow customers to provide or update delivery details for items in the cart.
ambiguities.reason: The source text does not specify whether this is about providing or updating, only that it involves delivery details.
